overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic city sidewalk at sunset. The camera moves steadily forward beneath elevated highway structures, passing modern corporate buildings with neon lighting, approaching the Arasaka corporation headquarters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing modern corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with red structural beams spanning overhead
tall dark corporate building with horizontal neon light strips that shift between green and red
horizontal cyan and red neon lighting mounted on the building facade
tall security fence running parallel to the road on the left side
modern angular street lamp with horizontal LED fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk with a modern corporate building on the right featuring shifting neon lights. A futuristic sedan passes by on the road to the left, while the setting sun creates a warm golden glow ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning to corporate plaza

events.description: camera turns left away from the building wall, opening up to reveal the wider street and Arasaka building ahead
exiting the shadow of the overpass, the scene becomes fully illuminated by the golden hour sunset

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the open street while continuing to walk forward, revealing the Arasaka corporate headquarters in the distance

entered.detail: massive black corporate headquarters with glowing white Arasaka logo and red accent lighting
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the building facade displaying corporate imagery
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway near the building entrance
red and white striped concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a wider urban street bathed in golden sunset light. The massive Arasaka corporate building dominates the view ahead with its distinctive logo and red neon accents. Digital billboards line the left side of the street while palm trees and road barriers appear on the right. The scene transitions from the enclosed walkway to an open corporate plaza approach.

events.description: approaching the Arasaka building entrance, the corporate logo becomes clearly legible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Arasaka building entrance, passing road barriers and street furniture

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the Arasaka building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate logo with Japanese characters and diamond symbol mounted on the building facade
orange traffic cones placed near the road barriers

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the imposing Arasaka corporate headquarters entrance. The camera moves forward along the wide plaza sidewalk with the building's illuminated logo now prominent and legible. Red neon accent lighting runs along the building's base, while the elevated highway structure remains visible overhead. The scene maintains the warm golden hour lighting as the journey ends at the corporate entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, sun-drenched corporate plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway structure, gliding along a concrete sidewalk past a corporate building with shifting neon lights as a futuristic sedan passes by. As the camera turns left, the enclosed walkway opens into a broad street bathed in a warm golden sunset, revealing digital billboards and palm trees that lead toward the towering Arasaka corporate building. The scene then shifts from the open road to a wide plaza approach, where the building's distinctive logo and red neon accents become increasingly prominent. Finally, the camera advances toward the imposing headquarters entrance, maintaining the golden hour glow while the highway structure remains visible overhead.
